headline: Humana Awarded Statewide Illinois HealthChoice Medicaid Contract, Expanding Access to Care Across the State
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., June 17, 2026--Humana Awarded Statewide Illinois HealthChoice Medicaid Contract, Expanding Access to Care Across the State
